findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'sab – what it is' (3x).

findings.description: The Venn diagram showing 'Modeling Supports Planning' with nested ellipses for 'Water Supply Planning' and 'River Basin Modeling' is missing from the HTML conversion. Only plain text labels are shown.
findings.evidence: PDF page 8 shows a graphical Venn/nested ellipse diagram with green and orange ovals. The HTML replacement shows only plain text 'Water Supply Planning' and 'River Basin Modeling' without any diagram.
